# Pinned build tools for generating protobuf Python bindings.
#
# These are DEVELOPER/CI tools only — not runtime dependencies.
# Install with: pip install -r tools/requirements-tools.txt
#
# grpcio-tools 1.62.x ships with protobuf 4.25.x, which generates pb2 files
# requiring protobuf>=4.25.2 at runtime. This is intentionally pinned to keep
# the generated files stable and compatible with the widest user base.
# (protobuf 4.x is in widespread use; 5.x introduces a strict runtime version
# check that would break users with other packages that require protobuf<5.)
#
# If you upgrade these pins you MUST:
#   1. Run: bash tools/gen_proto.sh
#   2. Update protobuf floor in requirements.txt and setup.py to match the
#      "Protobuf Python Version" comment in any regenerated pb2 file.
#   3. Consider whether the upgrade is a breaking change for library users.
grpcio-tools==1.62.3
protobuf==4.25.1
